name: My Engine
description: A local Switchbay engine that exposes a small set of commands as agent-callable tools.

tools.name: status
tools.description: Check that the engine is installed and ready.

tools.name: query
tools.description: Ask the engine to inspect or summarize local context.

query.description: Question, instruction, or context for the engine.

tools.name: preview
tools.description: Preview a planned change without writing to external systems.

target.description: File, record, route, product, or object to preview.

tools.name: apply
tools.description: Apply a change through the engine. This always requires approval.

target.description: File, record, route, product, or object to change.

tools.approval_reason: Apply writes or external side effects through this engine.
